# Copilot Instructions

## Commit Convention

This project uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/). When suggesting or writing commits:

- Format: `<type>(<scope>): <description>`
- Types: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `style`, `refactor`, `test`, `chore`, `revert`
- Scope: optional, use to indicate affected module/component
- Description: imperative mood, lowercase, no period

Examples:
- `feat(auth): add login form validation`
- `fix(api): handle null response in user endpoint`
- `docs(readme): update installation steps`

- `npm run lint` — Lint and format
